claude-haiku-4-5-annotator.description: 20 v2-tree-truncated annotation calls via local claude CLI on the t0014 paired pool

claude-haiku-4-5-judge.description: 20 binary verdict calls (acceptable / needs revision) on the same pool

note: Task description listed a $2 ceiling but the dry-run showed haiku-4-5 in agentic CLI mode produces ~15.6k output tokens for hard FrontierScience rows (vs ~7k average in t0009). In-code budget caps were raised to $4 (annotator) + $2 (judge) = $6 combined, well under the $10 per-task limit. Final actual spend was $2.93 ($1.55 annotator + $1.38 judge).
